name: sequesign
description: Cryptographically verifiable receipts of an agent's delegated work, verified offline.
long_description: Sequesign turns an MCP-capable agent into one that can prove what it did. It opens a signed action chain, records each action (the evidence is hashed and signed), and seals the result into a receipt that an independent witness co-signs. The agent's signing key never leaves the machine — in direct mode the witness only co-signs a hash. Receipts verify offline, support multi-party approval and counterparty attestations, and can be checked against the broker-stored, registered-identity copy.

tools.name: sequesign_start_session
tools.description: Open a receipt-recording session (one signed action chain).

tools.name: sequesign_record_action
tools.description: Append a signed action to the chain (evidence is hashed and signed).

tools.name: sequesign_record_approval
tools.description: Attach a locally signed approval for a recorded action.

tools.name: sequesign_record_counterparty_attestation
tools.description: Attach a counterparty's signed confirmation of a recorded action.

tools.name: sequesign_approve_receipt
tools.description: Attach an independently-witnessed approval to an already-sealed receipt (deferred satellite).

tools.name: sequesign_countersign_receipt
tools.description: Attach an independently-witnessed counterparty confirmation to an already-sealed receipt (deferred satellite).

tools.name: sequesign_finalize
tools.description: Seal + witness the receipt and run the SDK's own verification.

tools.name: sequesign_verify
tools.description: Verify a sealed receipt offline (local self-check, external trust, or the broker-stored copy).

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Transport: 'direct' (sign locally, an independent witness co-signs — your key never leaves this machine) or 'managed' (route through the Sequesign broker for a registered identity). Managed mode requires an API key and the registered agent key below.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Your Sequesign write-class API key from the dashboard (Settings → API keys → Create key). Required for managed mode; in direct mode it authenticates the witness signing request against the hosted witness. Leave blank only if you point at a witness that allows unauthenticated signing. Stored in your OS keychain.

agent_private_key.title: Agent private key (PEM)
agent_private_key.description: Ed25519 PKCS#8 private-key PEM for the agent. In MANAGED mode this must be the key REGISTERED to your API key — either the one the dashboard generated at API-key creation, or your own key whose public half you registered via 'Bring your own public key (advanced)'. The broker rejects any key that isn't registered to your API key. In DIRECT mode, leave blank to mint a fresh ephemeral key per session, or paste any PEM for a stable self-asserted identity. Paste the full PEM including the BEGIN/END lines. Stored in your OS keychain.

package_dir.title: Receipt package directory
package_dir.description: Folder where sealed receipt packages are written. Leave blank to use a temporary directory.
